# Forged in Trials
## Scripture
"We also glory in our sufferings, because we know that suffering produces perseverance; perseverance, character; and character, hope." – Romans 5:3-4

## Reflection
As men of faith, we often face trials and tribulations that test our resolve and faith. It's easy to get discouraged and lose sight of the bigger picture. However, Scripture reminds us that our struggles can be used to forge us into stronger, more resilient men of God. Through perseverance, we are transformed, and this transformation leads to hope – a hope that is not based on our circumstances but on the promises of God. As we face our own trials, let's remember that we are not alone and that our sufferings can be used to build our character.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 5 miles while praying for perseverance to see you through the tough times."
